# WC 2026 — Knockout Bracket Predictions (R32 → Final)

**Generated:** 2026-06-28 (group stage complete, all 12 groups final)
**Model:** Ensemble in `wc2026-predictor.jsx` with default CFG (`shrink 1.5`, `halflife 1.5`, all weights `1.0`), knockout mode on, **travel fatigue on**.
**Graphic:** see `bracket-prediction.png` (generated by `scripts/bracket-graphic.mjs`).

These are model-generated predictions, not hand-picked. Each winner is the side with the
higher knockout win probability; the bracket is then cascaded forward (R32 winners fill R16,
and so on) until a champion falls out. The bracket structure matches the **official FIFA
match numbering** (M73–M104) from the canadamexicousa2026 scores-fixtures bracket.

## Methodology

- **Power ranking** per team = shrink-weighted blend of pre-tournament Elo and *earned* Elo from
  played group-stage results, plus form / momentum / defensive solidity / convincing-margin
  indices (recency-weighted, half-life 1.5 matches). This is fixed from current results.
- **Travel fatigue** is the only thing that cascades round-to-round. For every match a penalty is
  applied to each side based on distance + eastward time-zone shift from its *previous* match
  venue to the current venue (`penalty = min(20, (miles + 200·tzEastShift)/1000 · 10)` Elo-score
  points). The cell annotations show `(−penalty, miles)`.
- **Score** = expected-goals (model λ) rounded, adjusted so the predicted winner reads as the
  higher score. Treat scorelines as indicative, the **Win %** as the real signal.

> The match log is the played group stage only — predicted KO results are **not** fed back into
> the power ratings (mirrors what the app's predictor shows for any single matchup). Only the
> travel chain carries forward.

## Predicted Podium

| | Team | Path |
|---|---|---|
| 🥇 **Champion** | 🇦🇷 **Argentina** | CPV → Egypt → Colombia → Brazil → France |
| 🥈 Runner-up | 🇫🇷 France | Sweden → Germany → Netherlands → Spain → _final_ |
| 🥉 Third place | 🇧🇷 Brazil | Japan → Ivory Coast → Mexico → _SF_ → Spain |

**Tightest calls** (near coin-flips, most sensitive to travel and form swings):
M104 Final Argentina–France (50.9%), M103 third-place Brazil–Spain (51.2%), M96 Switzerland–Colombia (51.2%),
M92 Mexico–England (51.6%), M102 SF Brazil–Argentina (53.8%), M101 SF France–Spain (54.7%).

> Regenerate after each round of real results with `node scripts/predict-bracket.mjs`
> (markdown) and `node scripts/bracket-graphic.mjs` (re-renders the SVG/HTML graphic).
